info.title: Notification for New Arrival of Timeseries Data Manufactured OpenAPI
info.summary: Insights Hub drives smart manufacturing through the industrial Internet of Things. Gain actionable insights with asset and operational data and improve your processes. Published API scope is limited to event notifications about telemetry arrival.
info.description: Manufactured OpenAPI artifact for Notification for New Arrival of Timeseries Data. This file was synthesized by Last Mile from curated research JSON and is not vendor-certified. Use it as an agent-consumable starting point, then validate paths, schemas, authentication, and server URLs with the vendor before production use. Insights Hub drives smart manufacturing through the industrial Internet of Things. Gain actionable insights with asset and operational data and improve your processes. This surface exists to notify downstream consumers about newly arrived telemetry rather than to manage the source records themselves. Asset data is Un-Supported. Telemetry data is Supported. Writeback is Un-Supported.

servers.description: Placeholder server template. Replace with the vendor-confirmed API host and base path before generating production clients.
